issue: Autoscaler configuration change reduced max surge, triggering aggressive scale-down and pod evictions during deploy windows.
resolution: Reverted autoscaler flags; added canary for autoscaler config; set eviction budget safeguards.
error_excerpt: Autoscaler configuration change reduced max surge, triggering aggressive scale-down and pod evictions during deploy wind
notes: Source: notion 172cc697a80a429fb907f14de9d47a62 | url: https://www.notion.so/Node-pool-autoscaler-caused-pod-evictions-172cc697a80a429fb907f14de9d47a62
author: Fiyi

issue: Intermediate certificate in service mesh trust bundle expired, causing elevated 503s between services.
resolution: Rotated intermediate cert; automated cert expiry alerts; added weekly trust-bundle validation job.
error_excerpt: Intermediate certificate in service mesh trust bundle expired, causing elevated 503s between services.
notes: Source: notion 50b1384467e14793847a93681c5ae817 | url: https://www.notion.so/mTLS-handshake-failures-due-to-expired-intermediate-cert-50b1384467e14793847a93681c5ae817
author: Fiyi

issue: Prometheus relabel config change dropped job labels for sidecar-exported metrics.
resolution: Rolled back relabel rules; added config unit tests; introduced staging canary scrape target.
error_excerpt: Prometheus relabel config change dropped job labels for sidecar-exported metrics.
notes: Source: notion 6ca5a546e6d344d09aee160966af149c | url: https://www.notion.so/Missing-metrics-after-sidecar-update-scrape-relabel-break-6ca5a546e6d344d09aee160966af149c
author: Fiyi

issue: I just faced an error with my terraform apply command, I don't seem to have permissions to create a private keyvault, anyone faced a similar issue?
resolution: hey, yes I've seen this before, I just made sure I was running my terraform with a service principal and not my personal user account
notes:

author: Fiyi
